title: Playground Tab Matrix
concept: A high-density tabbed project workspace for power users managing several Playgrounds at once, with project tabs across the shell, within-project tabs for Site Manager tools, and a split editor plus WordPress preview.
focus: project tabs for multiple saved, unsaved, local-directory, and Blueprint-backed Playgrounds
within-project tabs for site, files, blueprints, database, logs, and settings
distinct launch routes with their real inputs and consequences
separate browser-storage and local-directory save destinations
flows: select a Gutenberg branch or PR route, choose a save destination, watch file-copy progress, and see the resulting saved project identity
switch among unsaved, browser-saved, local-directory, and Blueprint-backed Playgrounds using project tabs
rename, delete, reload, export to GitHub, download .zip, or import .zip over the current site from saved management
navigate Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser, Blueprint editor and gallery, database, and logs while keeping preview visible
search and filter the Blueprint catalog, inspect a selected Blueprint JSON, copy its link, download its bundle, or run it
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
